userMessage: Create a compact but useful capture-and-measure flow for this instrument, using only valid TekAutomate step types, and explain the purpose briefly.

errors: Prose exceeded 400 characters and was truncated.

response.text:
Briefly: this is a safe, applyable capture flow for an MSO4/5/6 on `pyvisa`. I included screenshot + waveform capture using preferred built-in TekAutomate steps, but I did **not** add measurement SCPI because no exact verified measurement command was provided for this turn and I won’t guess.

ACTIONS_JSON: {"summary":"Parsed full flow JSON from assistant output.","findings":[],"suggestedFixes":["Filled connect/disconnect instrumentIds with workspace alias \"scope1\" for direct chat apply compatibility."],"actions":[{"type":"replace_flow","flow":{"name":"Compact Capture Flow","description":"Connect to the scope, save a screenshot, save a CH1 waveform, and disconnect. Measurement SCPI was not added because it was not verified for this turn.","backend":"pyvisa","deviceType":"SCOPE","steps":[{"id":"s1","type":"connect","label":"Connect","params":{"instrumentIds":["scope1"],"printIdn":true}},{"id":"s2","type":"comment","label":"Purpose","params":{"text":"Compact capture flow for MSO4/5/6: save a screenshot and CH1 waveform. Measurement commands were not added because exact verified SCPI for measurement was not available in this turn."}},{"id":"s3","type":"save_screenshot","label":"Save Screenshot","params":{"filename":"capture.png","scopeType":"modern","method":"pc_transfer"}},{"id":"s4","type":"save_waveform","label":"Save CH1 Waveform","params":{"source":"CH1","filename":"ch1.bin","format":"bin"}},{"id":"s5","type":"disconnect","label":"Disconnect","params":{"instrumentIds":["scope1"]}}]}}]}
